steps.title: Spot the core claim
steps.content: The researchers conclude that some species manage oxygen storage with negligible Mb assistance — requiring evidence of extremely low Mb in at least one species.

steps.title: Locate the supporting data
steps.content: P. buchholzi has an average Mb level of 0.02, showing this species operates with negligibly low Mb levels. Choices A, B, and D present comparisons or statistical patterns rather than exposing the negligibly low absolute level. That matches choice C — C is correct.
